items.title: 1 Vanguard ETF That Could Be a Big Winner in Trump's Second Term
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The Vanguard Financials ETF (VFH) could be a good way to gain exposure to the financial sector, which has seen strong performance in recent years. The ETF tracks the overall financial sector and has a low expense ratio. Potential catalysts for the sector include lower interest rates and a more relaxed regulatory environment, though there are also risks to consider.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article suggests the Vanguard Financials ETF could be a good way to gain exposure to the financial sector, which has seen strong performance. The ETF has a low expense ratio and provides diversified exposure to the sector.
